case_title: RAYMOND LI TOM TRUSTEE L W TOM ADMINISTRATIVE VS. JEAN WONG et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JEAN WONG, ESTHER
